commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And a mixed race shall dwell in Ashdod, and I will cut off the pride of the Philistines. Hebrew mamzer; "bastard "or rather "stranger. "It is reported that Alexander was the illegitimate son of Nest banes, whom Olympius took for Jupiter. ) But these might be popular reports. The sequel seems to show that the Jews, occupied the towns of the Philistines under the Machabees. (Chaldean) (Grotius) (Calmet) The divider may denote any conqueror. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
